title: Coin-Copter: Data, Code, and Fabrication Files
description: Archived data, analysis and plotting code, control software, CAD and fabrication files, and supporting documentation associated with the Science Advances manuscript "A Stable Coin-sized Helicopter Design with Enough Lift for Autonomy."
